title: thelymitra canaliculata
intro: Thelymitra canaliculata, also known as the canal spider orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of the canal spider orchid include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as a tincture or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to make ointments and salves.
